findings.detail: Latest catalog ATLAS heartbeat docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-16T05-09-01Z-atlas.json: cycle C-313, gi 0.8, mode green, source live, anomalies [], seed_result 200 OK, sustain_eligible false.
GET /api/integrity-status: source kv (not mock); gi_provenance kv-live; degraded true; global_integrity 0.81; mode green; gi_verified false; cycle C-313.

GET /api/signals/micro: composite gi 0.655, errors 10, payload cycle C-306 vs integrity-status cycle C-313 — treat micro cycle label as possibly stale vs operator cycle. Multiple elevated severities align with chronic upstream/API stress; ATLAS heartbeat listed no named anomalies — independent sweep still shows widespread instrument stress.

GI band spans catalog heartbeat (0.8), live micro composite (0.655), and KV integrity-status (0.81) at verification time — not a single reconciled scalar; gi_verified remains false on integrity payload.
GET /api/epicon/candidates returned count 0 — no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).
POST /api/vault/attest returned HTTP 404 (HTML not-found page); quorum_status not recorded — C-298 path not present on deployed surface.
POST /api/agents/journal returned HTTP 502 with error github_403; mirrored_to_kv false — substrate mirror blocked this pass.

recommendation: Treat headline GI as KV-backed live but compare to fresh micro composite before operator decisions. Restore or deploy POST /api/vault/attest (or document the supported quorum registration alternative). Fix GitHub substrate credentials/permissions for agent journal writes.
